Brand.name: Zentrik
Brand.shortDescription: We build custom software, SaaS products and API integrations for businesses that need to move fast.

Hero.badge: Software studio · Operating globally from Latin America
Hero.title: We build the software that moves modern businesses
Hero.subtitle: Zentrik Technologies LLC is a global software studio. We design, build and operate custom applications, SaaS products and API integrations (Meta, Stripe, WhatsApp Business and more) for startups and companies that need to ship fast.
Hero.trustLine: Distributed team · Modern stack · Iterative delivery with full visibility

Services.title: Four service lines, one engineering team
Services.subtitle: We work as an extension of your team — from a first MVP to a production platform that scales to thousands of users.

customDev.title: Custom software development
customDev.description: Web and mobile apps, internal systems, B2B platforms. Modern stack (TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node, Go), clean architecture and code your team can actually maintain.

saasProducts.title: Our own SaaS products
saasProducts.description: We build and operate SaaS products for specific markets. Sendio (business messaging on WhatsApp and Meta) is the first in the portfolio; more are on the way.

apiIntegrations.title: API integrations
apiIntegrations.description: Specialists in third-party APIs: Meta Cloud API, WhatsApp Business, Stripe, Mercado Pago, HubSpot, Salesforce, Google Workspace and more. We connect what your business needs.

consulting.title: Consulting and architecture
consulting.description: Technical audits, cloud architecture design, code review and mentoring for in-house teams. We come in when you need a serious second opinion.

Process.title: A transparent process, no surprises
Process.subtitle: Weekly iteration, sprint demos and a single point of contact. You always know where we are.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.description: We understand the business, the users and the real problem. You walk out with clear scope, identified risks and an honest estimate.

step2.title: Design and architecture
step2.description: We define architecture, data model, integrations and experience. You get diagrams, documented decisions and a sprint-by-sprint roadmap.

step3.title: Iterative build
step3.description: Weekly sprints with live demos. Access to the repo, staging and board at all times. Zero black box.

step4.title: Launch and support
step4.description: We support the go-live, set up observability and train your team. We offer ongoing support plans if you need them.

Products.title: We build our own software, not just for clients
Products.subtitle: We reinvest in SaaS products that solve real problems. Here is what we are building today.

sendio.name: Sendio
sendio.description: Business messaging platform on WhatsApp Business and Meta Cloud APIs. Campaigns, automations and multi-agent inbox for sales and support teams in LATAM.

next.name: More products
next.description: We are exploring the next verticals. If you have a recurring problem in your industry, we want to hear about it — many times that pain becomes our next product.

custom.name: Something custom?
custom.description: If your company needs a platform that does not exist in the market, we build it with you. We work with Series A startups upwards and established companies.

Faq.title: What we usually get asked
Faq.subtitle: Something missing? Email us at hola@zentrik.lat and we'll get back to you.

what.q: What exactly does Zentrik Technologies do?
what.a: We are a global software studio. We do three things: (1) we build custom applications for companies, (2) we operate our own SaaS products like Sendio, and (3) we provide technical and architectural consulting. Everything we do goes through a senior engineering team.

where.a: We operate globally with a distributed team. Today our operational presence is in Latin America and we are in the process of formal incorporation in the United States to better serve international clients.

size.q: Do you work with startups or large companies?
size.a: Both. We specialize in startups that need speed and in established companies looking to modernize critical areas. If your project is serious and well-defined, we want to talk.

stack.a: Frontend: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind. Backend: Node, Go, Python depending on the case. Infra: AWS, GCP, Cloudflare. Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis. Messaging: NATS, Kafka. We pick the tool that solves the problem, not the trendy one.

billing.q: How do you bill a project?
billing.a: We work in sprints (time & materials with an agreed cap) or fixed-scope deliverables, whichever fits. We bill monthly from Zentrik Technologies LLC. We accept USD via wire, Stripe and stablecoins.

compliance.q: Do you sign NDAs and meet compliance requirements?
compliance.a: Yes. We sign NDAs before any detailed conversation. We apply security best practices (encryption in transit and at rest, least privilege, mandatory code review) and work with clients that require GDPR, SOC2 light and WhatsApp/Meta policies.

differenceUS.q: Are you related to other companies named 'Sendio'?
differenceUS.a: No. Sendio Inc. (United States) is an email security company entirely unrelated to us. Our Sendio product (by Zentrik Technologies) operates in WhatsApp messaging on Meta APIs for LATAM. Different markets, different products, no corporate relationship.

FinalCta.title: Have a project in mind?
FinalCta.subtitle: Tell us what you need to build. We respond in under 48 hours with concrete questions and next steps.

Footer.tagline: Global software studio. We build custom software, SaaS products and API integrations.
Footer.legalEntity: Zentrik Technologies LLC · Headquartered in Latin America · US incorporation in progress.
Footer.disclaimer: Sendio is a brand and product of Zentrik Technologies LLC, with no relation to Sendio Inc. (USA — email security).

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern access to and use of the services provided by Zentrik Technologies LLC ("Zentrik", "we"), including custom software development, our own SaaS products, API integrations and consulting services. By contracting our services or using any of our products, you accept these Terms.

identity.title: 1. Provider identity
identity.body: The services and products described are provided by Zentrik Technologies LLC ("Zentrik"), a global software studio with operations in Latin America and a formal incorporation process underway in the United States. Operational headquarters: Latin America. Legal contact: legal@zentrik.lat. Zentrik owns all intellectual property associated with its products, including the "Sendio" brand. Disclaimer: Zentrik Technologies' "Sendio" brand has no relation, partnership or link of any kind with Sendio Inc. (United States), an email security solutions company.

services.title: 2. Services and products
services.body: Zentrik offers: (a) custom software development (web, mobile, backend, integrations); (b) own SaaS products; (c) technical and architectural consulting; (d) third-party API integrations (Meta, Stripe, WhatsApp Business, etc.). The specific scope of each engagement is documented in a separate proposal or Statement of Work (SOW), which is an integral part of these Terms.

engagement.title: 3. Engagement model
engagement.body: We work under two main models: time & materials (T&M) with an agreed cap per sprint, or fixed-scope deliverables. Each engagement is governed by a written proposal or SOW detailing scope, deadlines, assigned team and billing terms.

ip.title: 4. Intellectual property
ip.body: Code and specific deliverables produced for a client under a SOW are transferred to the client upon full payment, unless otherwise agreed. Zentrik retains ownership of its base software, internal frameworks, proprietary libraries, SaaS products (including Sendio) and any intellectual property not specific to the client's project.

use.title: 5. Acceptable use
use.body: Clients and users agree to use Zentrik's services and products within applicable law, respecting third-party platform policies (especially Meta Platforms, Inc., the WhatsApp Business Platform, and the WhatsApp Commerce Policy when applicable), and refraining from any use that may compromise the security, integrity or reputation of Zentrik or its clients. In particular, and pursuant to the WhatsApp Business Messaging Policy, the use of Sendio or any Zentrik product is EXPRESSLY PROHIBITED by: (a) governments, government agencies, political parties, electoral candidates, campaigns or political action committees (PACs); (b) official accounts for political, electoral or propaganda messaging; (c) any activity listed as prohibited at https://business.whatsapp.com/policy. Zentrik reserves the right to immediately suspend, without refund, any account that violates these restrictions.

confidentiality.title: 6. Confidentiality
confidentiality.body: Zentrik signs Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) when the client requires it. We treat all commercial, technical and strategic information from our clients as confidential by default, accessible only to the team assigned to the project.

billing.title: 7. Billing and payments
billing.body: Invoices are issued by Zentrik Technologies LLC. We accept USD via wire transfer, Stripe (card) and stablecoins (USDC). Standard payment terms: 15 days from issuance, unless otherwise agreed in the SOW. Late payment may result in service suspension.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of liability
liability.body: Services and products are provided with reasonable professional diligence. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Zentrik will not be liable for indirect damages, loss of profits, loss of data or interruptions arising from use of the services or third-party APIs (Meta, cloud providers, etc.). Total liability is limited to the amount actually invoiced in the last 6 months.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.body: Either party may terminate the engagement with 30 days' notice, unless different terms are defined in the SOW. After termination, Zentrik delivers the work completed and retains client information for the legally required period.

law.title: 10. Applicable law and jurisdiction
law.body: These Terms are governed by the law applicable to Zentrik Technologies LLC in its jurisdiction of incorporation. Disputes will be submitted to the competent courts, without prejudice to mediation or arbitration that the parties agree in writing.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.body: For questions about these Terms, write to us at legal@zentrik.lat.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: At Zentrik Technologies LLC ("Zentrik") we respect your privacy. This Policy describes what data we collect through our website (zentrik.lat), commercial interactions and our SaaS products, for what purpose, and what your rights are.

controller.title: 1. Data controller
controller.body: The data controller is Zentrik Technologies LLC. To exercise your rights you can write to us at privacy@zentrik.lat.

data.title: 2. Data we collect
data.body: We collect: (a) contact data when you write to us or request a proposal (name, email, company, message); (b) account and usage data when you use one of our SaaS products; (c) basic site analytics (visited pages, device, country, no direct personal identification); (d) contractual and billing data when applicable.

purpose.title: 3. Purpose
purpose.body: We process data to: respond to commercial inquiries, provide contracted services, operate our SaaS products, bill, improve the site and products, comply with legal obligations and prevent fraud.

legal.title: 4. Legal basis
legal.body: Processing is based on consent (contact forms), contract execution (services and products), and our legitimate interest in operating and improving what we offer.

share.title: 5. Sharing data with third parties
share.body: We share data with providers acting on our behalf (cloud, analytics, communication, payments) and with platforms necessary to operate our products (for example, Meta Platforms, Inc. when a SaaS product runs on their APIs). We require contractual confidentiality and security commitments from those providers.

transfer.title: 6. International transfers
transfer.body: As a global studio, part of our infrastructure and providers are located outside your country of residence. We adopt the measures required by applicable regulations to ensure an adequate level of protection.

retention.title: 7. Retention
retention.body: We retain data for the duration of the commercial or contractual relationship and for additional applicable legal periods. After that, we delete or anonymise it.

rights.title: 8. Your rights
rights.body: You can request access, rectification, deletion, portability and objection regarding your personal data by writing to privacy@zentrik.lat. We respond within applicable legal timeframes.

security.title: 9. Security
security.body: We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect data: encryption in transit and at rest, role-based access control, monitoring, auditing and periodic provider review.

changes.title: 10. Changes to this Policy
changes.body: We may update this Policy. We will notify material changes by email or from the site.
